name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue, crash, or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug

---
# 🐛 Bug Report Template

> **Usage Note:** Replace the text in brackets `[ ]` and remove italicized examples before submitting.

---

## 1. Bug Title
**[Short, descriptive summary of the issue]**

*Example: "Player character gets stuck when walking down stairs in the basement map"*

---

## 2. Expected Behavior
**[What SHOULD happen when the game is working correctly?]**

*Example: "When stepping on the stair tile, the player should smoothly transition to the lower floor map."*

---

## 3. Actual Behavior (The Bug)
**[What ACTUALLY happens right now?]**

*Example: "The player triggers an upward movement instead of downward, and collides with the wall behind the stairs."*

---

## 4. Steps to Reproduce
**[Step-by-step instructions on how to reliably trigger the bug]**

*Example:*
*1. Load the game and navigate to `01-basement.tmj`.*
*2. Walk towards the stairs tile (tile ID 17).*
*3. Step on it.*
*4. Observe the character moving in the wrong direction.*

---

## 5. Context & Environment
**[Any specific conditions required to reproduce the bug?]**

- **Map/Level:** *[e.g., Basement, World Map]*
- **Specific Entities/Items:** *[e.g., Only happens with the 'Speed Boots' equipped?]*
- **Frequency:** *[e.g., Happens 100% of the time, or only randomly?]*

---

## 6. Logs & Error Messages (If applicable)
**[Paste any console errors, crash logs, or terminal output here]**

```text
[Paste your error log here, if the game crashed or threw a Python exception]
```
